generated_oml:
instance AECOBuildingInfrastructureEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Complex and heterogeneous infrastructure assets in Architecture, Engineering, Construction and Operations (AECO) domain, spanning the entire lifecycle from initial design through construction, operation, and refurbishment"
    base:contains BuildingStructure, BuildingSystems, OperationalDataStream
]

instance BuildingStructure : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Physical structures of buildings in AECO domain"
]

instance BuildingSystems : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Building systems including HVAC, electrical, and plumbing"
]

instance OperationalDataStream : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Real-time operational data streams integrated for simulation, analysis, and optimization"
]

instance BIMModelWithBCS : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "BIM models extended to include Building Control System (BCS) components (sensors, actuators, controllers), creating a unified semantic foundation"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ModelDrivenEngineeringEnabler
]

instance StructuredRepresentationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Structured representations extracted from enriched BIM models using Model-Driven Engineering (MDE) principles for deployable DT artifacts"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ModelDrivenEngineeringEnabler
]

instance DeployableDTArtifacts : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Deployable digital twin artifacts generated automatically from structured representations"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ModelDrivenEngineeringEnabler
]

instance BuildingControlSystemSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensors within Building Control System (BCS) components for real-time monitoring"
    DTDFVocab:producedData RealTimeDataTransmitted
]

instance BCSActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Actuators within Building Control System (BCS) components for control actions"
]

instance BCSController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Controllers within Building Control System (BCS) components for system regulation"
]

instance RealTimeDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom BuildingControlSystemSensor
]

instance RealTimeBuildingData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time operational data streams synchronized between physical building and digital twin"
    DTDFVocab:fromData RealTimeDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo RealTimeDataIntegrationEnabler
]

instance ModelDrivenEngineeringEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Model-Driven Engineering (MDE) principles for transforming BIM models into structured representations and deployable DT artifacts"
    DTDFVocab:enables PredictiveAnalyticsService, OptimizationService
]

instance RealTimeDataIntegrationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Real-time data exchange for synchronizing physical building data with digital twin"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService
]

instance ModularArchitectureEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Modular architecture with standardized extension points for seamless integration of custom services and analytics"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService, PredictiveAnalyticsService, OptimizationService
]

instance RealTimeMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time monitoring for infrastructure performance insights"
    DTDFVocab:provides InfrastructurePerformanceInsight
]

instance PredictiveAnalyticsService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Predictive analytics for maintenance and failure forecasting"
    DTDFVocab:provides FailureForecastInsight, MaintenanceRecommendation
]

instance OptimizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Optimization of operational processes to support data-driven decision-making by AECO stakeholders"
    DTDFVocab:provides OperationalProcessOptimization
]

instance InfrastructurePerformanceInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time performance metrics of infrastructure assets for AECO stakeholders"
]

instance FailureForecastInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predictive analysis for potential building system failures"
]

instance MaintenanceRecommendation : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Data-driven recommendations for proactive maintenance scheduling"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance OperationalProcessOptimization : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Optimization of building operational processes for efficiency"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin lifecycle encompasses initial device modeling within BIM environments by Building Control Engineers, where sensors, actuators, and controllers are defined to address BIM's limitations. Model-Driven Engineering (MDE) principles extract structured representations from enriched BIM models, automatically generating deployable DT artifacts with minimal manual intervention. Subsequent phases include real-time data exchange for continuous synchronization between physical and digital entities, interactive visualization for Facility Manager monitoring and control operations, and modular architecture with standardized extension points enabling DT Engineers to integrate custom services and analytics, facilitating evolution aligned with operational changes."
]
